titleStmt.title: SII 18.188: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 188. (B.K. No. 28 of 1934-35.) IṬGI, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription referring itself to the reign of Rāyamurāri Sōvidēva registers a gift of land made by Kēs11irāja, the subordinate of Garuḍa-Pāṇḍyadēva, to a tank called Gaṅgasamudra. The gift was made in the presence of Sandhivigrahi Sōvarasa and other pradhānas. It also registers the grant of land made to god Virūpākshadēva of Iṭṭige by Garuḍa-Pāṇḍyadēva, who is referred to as Banavāsi-puravar-ādhīs11vara and is stated to be governing Nūṛumbāḍa from his capital Ṟaṭṭapaḷḷi.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© śrī namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁbhavē . namaśśivāya nama .
svasti samastaprithuvīprastutamāgirppa kuṁtaḷāvaniyaṁ
viśvastutanāḷvaṁ vinayābhyastaṁ sale negaḷda sōvidēvāvanipaṁ . svasti samastabhuvana
vallabhaṁ . suvarṇnavṛṣabhadhvajaṁ . ḍamarugatūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ
kadanapracaṁḍaṁ . mānakanakācaḷaṁ . kāḷaṁjarapuravarādhīśvaraṁ . pra
tāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ śrīmatu kaḷacuryyacakravartti rāyamurāri sōvidēvaru
sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyyuttamire . kaṁ . sogayipa kuṁtaḷabhūkāṁtege
kuṁtaḷavidedalenipa banavāseyoḷoppuguventu nōḷpaḍaṁ dhātrige nōḍa vici
travenisi nūṟuṁbāḍaṁ . Enipa pogaḷtegavaggaḷavenisida tadbhūmigīśvaraṁ kētarasaṁ ja
navinutananaṁtadhātrīśanagēṁdraprabaḷakuḷiśanavanītaḷadoḷu . Ā vibhu
viṁgaṁ laḷiyādēvigavudayisidanuditapuṇyaṁ varalakṣmīvallabhanāttadharitrīvi
nutaṁ negaḷda garaḍapāṁḍyakṣitipaṁ . v® . Ugralalāṭanētraśikhiyo
ḷtoḍardāḍuva bāḍavāgniyoḷvigrahadāgrahaṁbaḍeva kāypinoḷaṁ siḍi
laṁ piḍugevoyvugrasamagraśauryyavanivāryyavideṁdagidaḷkikaṁḍu
nirvyagrare niścayaṁ garaḍapāṁḍyamahīpanoḷaṁnyabhūmiparu .
digibhabrātaṁgaḷindradvipaparikaradaṁtāge celvādavaṁbhōdhigaḷellaṁ kṣīranī
rākaraviḷasanadaṁtāge voppirdduvīśādrigaḷeṁbaṁtādavādaṁ kulanagavaṟidēṁ
parvvidattiṁtu mūruṁjagadoḷnairmalyakīrtyujvaḷike garuḍapāṁḍyakṣa
māpāḷa ninna . © svasti samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda ma
hāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvaraṁ Uddaṁḍamaṁḍaḷikamada
namahēśvaraṁ pratāpalaṁkēśvaraṁ . satyarādhēyaṁ . śaucagāṁgēyaṁ .
śrīmanmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ garuḍapāṁḍyadēvarnnūṟuṁbāḍamaṁ duṣṭani
grahasiṣṭapratipāḷanaṁgeydu ṟaṭṭapaḷḷiya paṭṭaṇado
ḷ sukhadiṁ rājyaṁgeyvuttavire . tatpādapadmōpajīvi .
śrīmatkāśyapagōtrapavitraṁ manumunicaritraṁ . śrīmanmahā
pradhānaṁ heggaḍe kēśirājāyyaṁgaḷeṁtene . v® . varagōtrāspadadiṁ suvarnna
vinutāḷaṁkāradiṁ sadbhudhōtkarasaṁsēbyateyiṁ sthiraprakṛtiyiṁ bhūlō
kamadhyasthanādiraviṁ mitra ḷpiṁ lasanmērubhūdharamaṁ
bhāvise kēśirā kradoḷu . sumanō
bāṇano tamma yaṁtanaṁtamahimaṁ śrī
nāthanaṁtanite rakādhīśanantama
rōrvvī rjjanneyanuvu
da khiḷaguṇōdātta harihara
nuṁ citta ḷda vibudharu . tadagrajanentene . vṛtta . manuvuṁ
jannanuvanvitācaritaraṁbhōrā maṁtri jannanuvādaṁ viḷasadgabhīraraniśaṁ lakṣmīśanuṁ nō
ḍa jannanuvaṁdu diṭa gā rudyaccaṁdranuṁ cenna jaṁ nanuvārayye kaḷā
kaḷāpa rviśvaṁbharācakradoḷu . kaṁ . dhareyoḷage kakkagauṇḍana piri
ya magaṁ riṁ piriya parahitanātananujaṁ sthiranadhikaṁ sāṁtagauṁḍa nāha
vaśauṁḍa . Avana perggaḍegaḷu . janavinutarccā paṁnnellakūḷa kalleyana suta
rvvinutaṁ heggaḍe masaṇeyananu ḷiseṭṭiyeṁbarddhare yoḷu .
Ā he masaṇeyaṁ kaṭṭisida ḷiseṭṭi kaṭṭisida kaṁna ragaṭṭakam .
śrīmadgaruḍapāṁḍyadēvaraka rāpūrbbakavāgi saṁdhivigrahi sōvara
saru sahitaṁ samasta pradhānaru mukhyavāgiyā kēśirājaru gaṁgasamudra
kkā keṟeya paḍuvaṇa kōḍiyalu biṭṭa gadde kamma 50 kannaragaṭṭakke virūpākṣadēvara ke
yya baḍagaṇa deseyalu biṭṭa gadde kammaṁ 30 vaṁ śrīmadgaruḍapāṁ
ḍyadēvarpratipāḷisuvarū . © śrīmanmahāmaṇḍaḷēśvaraṁ garuḍapāṁ
ḍyadēvariṭṭigeya virūpākṣadēvarige mumṁna naḍava dharmmava prati
pāḷisi kannaragaṭṭada teṁkaṇa kōḍiyēriya keḷage giḷivu
ṇiseya keymattaroṁdallimmūḍaṇa gadde kammavaiyvattantinituvuṁ dhārāpū
rvvakavāgi biṭṭaru . Ī dharmmavaṁ pratipāḷisidargge kurukṣētra vāraṇāsi
yalu sahasra brāhmaṇargge sāyira kavileyanubhayamukhigo
ṭṭaphalavaku . Idanaḷidarggā tīrtthadalā kavilevanā brāhmaṇaruvanaḷida pā
takanakku . ślōka . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasuṁdharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasaha srāṇiLines 54—55 are engraved on a
viṣṭhāyāṁ jāyatē kṛmiḥ . ©
© rājisuva hosavaḍaṁgile janeseva maga cikkōjaṁ rājise kaṁḍari sidanī mūjagadoḷnegaḷda śivakumāran dhīraṁ . ©This line is engraved on the oval portion at the top.
Digital edition of SII 18.188 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
